ModMetaData.name: Chemfuel from Tar
ModMetaData.author: wishRobber
ModMetaData.description:
Reworks Vanilla Factions Expanded - Medieval 2's alchemy-workbench chemfuel recipes for a Medieval Overhaul tar economy: - Removes "Make chemfuel from organics". - Changes "Make chemfuel from wood" into "Make chemfuel from tar", consuming Medieval Overhaul's tar (DankPyon_Tar, gathered at the mine shaft) instead of wood logs. Amounts are unchanged (70 tar -> 25 chemfuel).
Requires both Vanilla Factions Expanded - Medieval 2 (the recipes) and Medieval Overhaul (the tar item); does nothing without both.
